codes.ACR: Annual rate of change corrected for the effect of methodological changes where applicable
codes.AVC: Annual average rate of change at constant tax rates
codes.CTM: Monthly rate of change at constant tax rates (HICP-CT)
codes.CTR: Annual rate of change at constant tax rates (HICP-CT)
codes.CTX: Monthly index at constant tax rates (HICP-CT)
codes.ECX: Monthly index, backdated, ECU (to 1989) and fixed euro conversion rate (from 1990) used for weights
codes.EPX: Monthly index, backdated, PPP exchange rates used for weights
codes.ERX: Monthly index, backdated, fixed euro conversion rate used for weights
codes.ICX: Monthly Index, with corrected German package holidays
codes.MAC: 12-month average rate of change at constant tax rates
